data.title: Arq Inc. to release Q2 financial results on Aug 11, 2025, and hold earnings call on Aug 12 at 8:30 am ET.
data.description: Arq, Inc., a leading producer of activated carbon and environmentally friendly carbon products, is set to disclose its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The company, listed as (NASDAQ: ARQ), will unveil its performance and submit its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period closing on June 30, 2025. These updates are expected to be released post-market closure on Monday, August 11, 2025. Furthermore, a conference call to delve into the financial outcomes is slated for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, August 12, 2025.

data.title: OptimizeRx to hold Q2 conference call on August 7, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss results ending June 30, 2025.
data.description: WALTHAM, Massachusetts - On July 17, 2025, OptimizeRx Corp. (Nasdaq: OPRX), a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider aiding life sciences firms in connecting with healthcare professionals and patients, announced its upcoming conference call scheduled for Thursday, August 7, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. EST. This call will focus on the company's performance during the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. The financial outcomes will be disclosed through a press release before the call takes place.

data.title: Almaden Minerals Ltd. plans to move listing from TSX to TSX Venture Exchange in Canada. Posted on July 17, 2025. Byline: GLOBE NEWSWIRE.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Almaden Minerals Ltd. revealed its plans to transition its Canadian stock exchange listing from the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: AMM) to the TSX Venture Exchange (TSXV: AAUAF). This move signifies the Company's strategic shift and commitment to the venture exchange platform.

data.title: Digi Power X acquires Supermicro NVIDIA B200 systems to launch Tier 3 NeoCloud AI infrastructure. News release for prospectus supplement.
data.description: This information is being released as a "designated news release" in relation to the Company's prospectus supplement dated May 30, 2025, which is connected to its short form base shelf prospectus from May 15, 2025.

Abbott Reports Second Quarter Adjusted EPS of 1.26 USD, Slightly Above Estimates of 1.25 USD, with Q2 EPS at 1.01 USD. The Company Sees Q3 Adjusted EPS Between 1.28 and 1.32 USD and Full Year Adjusted EPS of 5.1 to 5.2 USD

data.title: New Hampshire passes SB 164 to protect homebuyers, endorsed by ALTA, AARP, and NELTA.-Measures against predatory contracts.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Washington, the General Court of New Hampshire was praised by the American Land Title Association (ALTA), AARP, and the New England Land Title Association (NELTA) for the passage of Senate Bill 164. ALTA, a renowned national trade association representing the land title insurance sector, along with AARP and NELTA, commended the state legislature for this significant move.

data.title: ManpowerGroup's Q2 2025 revenues flat at $4.5B (-3% CC, -1% organic CC). Strong demand in Latin America and Asia, stabilizing trends in Europe and North America.
data.description: In the last quarter, revenues totaled $4.5 billion, remaining steady compared to last year. However, there was a 3% decrease in constant currency and a 1% decline in organic constant currency. Latin America and Asia Pacific regions maintained strong demand, while Europe and North America exhibited stabilizing trends in numerous markets. The focus during the quarter was on Manpower and Talent Solutions.

data.title: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety buys Idaho's Accurate Fire Protection Solutions on July 17, 2025, enhancing their services.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the leading fully integrated fire protection, life safety, and security services provider in the U.S., announced its acquisition of Accurate Fire Protection Solutions, specialists in fire sprinkler systems located in Hailey, Idaho. This strategic move further solidifies Pye-Barker's position in the market and expands its reach to include the expertise of Accurate Fire Protection Solutions.

data.title: Legacy donor systems in nonprofits are costly, as AI-powered platforms rise. Impacts on efficiency and donor retention.
data.description: Outdated donor systems are quietly impacting efficiency, donor retention, and overall effectiveness, as AI-driven unified data platforms are becoming the key solution. Richmond, Virginia, saw a major shift on July 17, 2025, where nonprofits are struggling amidst a complex landscape. The transition towards modern data platforms is crucial for organizations, as they strive to improve performance and build long-lasting success.

data.title: Bulat Utemuratov Foundation empowers 40,000+ Kazakh students with Jas Leader Program. Transitioning to strategic management.
data.description: In Almaty, Kazakhstan, on July 17, 2025, the Jas Leader Akademiiasy program, initiated by the Bulat Utemuratov Foundation in 2021 to develop leadership abilities in Kazakhstani youth, has successfully concluded its trial period. Moving forward, the program's administration will transition to new leadership.
Deutsche Bank Starts Covering Mastercard with a Buy Rating and Sets a Price Target of $650

data.title: Veritone gets "Awardable" status in P1 Solutions Marketplace, enhancing its AI tools for Department of Defense work.
data.description: Veritone, a company based in Denver, has recently been recognized as "Awardable" in the Platform One (P1) Solutions Marketplace. This achievement signifies the company's excellence in the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Mobix Labs sees a surge in defense orders, leading to revenue growth in filter and interconnect products.
data.description: A prominent tech company, Mobix Labs, Inc. (NASDAQ: MOBX), based in Irvine, California, has reported substantial growth in revenue for its filter and interconnect products. This growth is attributed to a notable increase in customer demand and successful contracts within essential defense and aerospace projects. Mobix Labs, through its subsidiary EMI Filter Solution, has experienced a sharp rise in orders for filter connectors.

data.title: Only 3 in 10 aviation executives feel their strategy can address future risks; 130 industry reps surveyed; 50% unsure of resilience.
data.description: In London on July 17, 2025, 130 senior aviation representatives participated in a report on emerging risks in the aviation industry by Willis, a WTW business. It was revealed that only half of the participants expressed confidence in their business model and strategy being resilient to current emerging risks, while just 30% believe their strategy will remain suitable over the next ten years. The report was conducted by Willis, a WTW business listed on NASDAQ as WTW.

data.title: Economic Recovery Center offers aid to businesses affected by floods in NJ & NY. Accepting applications to help.
data.description: In Fort Myers, Florida on July 17, 2025, Economic Recovery Center, a prominent organization specializing in disaster recovery aid, has begun receiving applications from businesses impacted by the floods in New Jersey and New York. The extensive flooding in these states has caused significant damage, prompting the organization to offer assistance to affected businesses.

data.title: WuXi AppTec's revenue up by 20.64% to $2.9 billion in the first half, forecasts net profit to double to $1.2 billion.
data.description: Drug services giant WuXi AppTec is expecting a significant increase in revenue and a doubling of net profit for the first half of the year due to improved U.S. policy conditions. The company's projections indicate a 20.64% year-on-year rise in revenue to approximately 20.80 billion yuan ($2.9 billion), with a 24.24% increase in revenue from continuing operations. Net profit is forecasted to double to 8.56 billion yuan for the six-month period. WuXi AppTec's business in peptides and synthesized molecules also saw impressive growth in the first quarter, hinting at becoming a key growth driver. China's pharmaceutical sector witnessed a notable uptick in stock performance, with specific companies excelling in innovative research compared to those providing general pharmaceutical services. WuXi AppTec's positive projections have reinvigorated investor interest in outsourcing partners within the pharmaceutical services industry.

data.title: AU Regulator warns crypto poses major threat in financial crime crackdown. Firms must brace for tougher rules by 2026.
data.description: By the year 2026, crypto companies need to ready themselves for more stringent regulations as AUSTRAC aims to address financial crime risks across the sector. This initiative will compel firms to enhance their compliance measures and bolster their efforts to combat illegal activities. The new rules will be aimed at minimizing vulnerabilities that may be exploited for criminal purposes. It is imperative for businesses operating in the crypto space to be proactive in ensuring adherence to the upcoming regulations to avoid potential penalties. AUSTRAC's focus on tightening oversight is vital for safeguarding against illicit financial activities within the industry. This development underscores the importance of robust compliance frameworks and efficient monitoring systems in the cryptocurrency sector in order to maintain integrity and security.

data.title: Morien partners with US firm for crushed stone projects in Atlantic Canada. TSX-V:MOX.
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia on July 17, 2025, Morien Resources Corp. revealed a new collaboration with a prominent U.S. crushed stone company to seek out and obtain approvals for enduring crushed stone ventures in Atlantic Canada. Morien, listed as "MOX" on TSX-V, expressed satisfaction with this strategic partnership, initiating a joint effort to uncover and secure potential opportunities in the region. The partnership signifies a significant step towards expanding the crushed stone sector in Atlantic Canada.

data.title: Kyruus Health integrates with Bing and other AI platforms to expand patient care access channels, building on the success of Reach launched in October 2024.
data.description: Kyruus Health, a top care access platform, recently expanded its digital channels for connecting patients with care. This expansion follows the successful launch of Reach in October 2024. The platform now offers increased listings managed by Kyruus to provide enhanced access to care for patients. This move is aimed at strengthening the company's commitment to facilitating patient access to healthcare services.
